title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: SWEET HOME CITY HALL DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Additional services may be offered. 3225 Main Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below (541) 367-8969 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 367-5128 Main phone Main phone (541) 367-8969 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SWEET HOME CITY HALL
